title: About
content: Momentos by Chris is a Las Vegas-based event planning business specializing in quinceañeras and milestone celebrations. Chris Murray has been coordinating events in the Las Vegas valley since 2018. Every event is different. Every family deserves a planner who listens.

title: Contact
content: Ready to start planning? Fill out the booking inquiry form or email chris.murray@Finthesiss.ai. You can also DM @momentosbychris on Instagram. We respond within 24 hours.

title: Privacy Policy
content: Momentos by Chris collects your name, email, and event details when you submit a booking inquiry. We use that information to respond to you. We do not sell your data.

title: Quinceañera Packages
content: We offer three quinceañera planning packages: Essential (day-of coordination), Classic (partial planning), and Premiere (full-service). Request a quote through the booking inquiry form.
